summary: A stellar matrix mix captures an electrifying New Year's Eve performance with standout versions of “On the Road Again”, “China Rider” and “Scarlet Fire”.
review: Listeners rave about this matrix‑only recording, calling it a work of art with superb room sound and well‑balanced SBD panning. The show itself is praised for its flowing New Year’s set – an acoustic ’80s opener followed by a soaring China Rider and a fiery Scarlet Fire combo – making it a must‑hear despite the audience being unusually loud in places.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high star ratings (mostly 5) and enthusiastic comments on both performance and matrix mix outweigh a single neutral note about audience level.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the matrix as “sickest copy”, a “work of art” with great room sound and SBD panning; one note mentions the audience being very loud, but overall the mix is praised for clarity and balance.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The New Year’s show flows nicely from an acoustic ’80s first set into a powerful China Rider and culminates with a favorite Scarlet Fire combo, keeping energy high throughout.
